source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 10. TCF_HAD1717MC, MG 230228 (Rev.8) - 2nd 사후심사 보완 적용/03. Risk_Management/A-RMR-0-01 Risk Management Report 230228 (Rev.3).docx

document.title: Risk Management Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG

sourceSummary.oneLine: Risk Management Report A-RMR-0-01 Rev.3 for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports risk management documentation for the device risk management file, including risk analysis, risk control, residual risk acceptability, and production/post-production information.
keyPoints: The report states that risk management activities follow EN ISO 14971:2019.
The device is intended for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children and is not for mammography.
The device is a wired digital flat panel X-ray detector used with TFT glass and scintillator.
The expected service life is approximately 5 years.
After risk control, all nine listed residual risks are evaluated as acceptable.
Post-production information for February 23, 2021 to December 15, 2022 reports no incident cases to MFDS, FDA, or MHRA.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source metadata includes authoritySignal FDA and path includes CE MDD, while the document references EU MDR, CE, KFDA, FDA/UL, MFDS, FDA, and MHRA without identifying one issuing authority.
Conflicting risk evaluation text: one table reports Green zone 0 and Red zone 9, while the following paragraph states six items are Green zone and three items are Red zone.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings such as Risk(LVEL), Not Acceptable Zoon, medical device accent report, and grammatical artifacts.
Manufacturer name appears in the conclusion as H&abyz, but the cover page does not provide a full manufacturer legal name or address.
